name: Feroxbuster
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Fast, recursive content discovery tool written in Rust. Detects installation and version only in this phase — no scan is executed.

install_instructions.linux: `sudo apt install feroxbuster` (Debian/Ubuntu/Kali) or install from the AUR (`yay -S feroxbuster`); official install script: `curl -sL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/epi052/feroxbuster/main/install-nix.sh | bash`. See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
